subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of My prison. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Most Great [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان استمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز العظیم ای
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
